---
title: "Data Tidying"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
```



```{r}
satresults <- read.csv("2012_SAT_Results_20260407.csv")

demographics <- read.csv("2006_-_2012_School_Demographics_and_Accountability_Snapshot_20260415.csv")
```

```{r}
data <- inner_join(demographics, satresults, by = "DBN")

data <- data |>
  filter(schoolyear == 20112012) |>
  select(DBN, Name, schoolyear, total_enrollment, SAT.Critical.Reading.Avg..Score, SAT.Math.Avg..Score, SAT.Writing.Avg..Score, Num.of.SAT.Test.Takers, male_num, male_per, female_num, female_per, black_num, black_per, white_num, white_per, hispanic_num, hispanic_per, asian_num, asian_per, selfcontained_num, ctt_num, sped_num, sped_percent, ell_num, ell_percent,)
```
